metadata.title: ProposalActionItem — single action entry in a ProposalResponse

description: Element of ProposalResponse.actions. Represents one action step in an autonomous proposal — either an AtomicAction step (action_id set) or a Flow step (flow_id set). Exactly one of action_id/flow_id should be non-null per ADR-026 intent. Crosses the API boundary as part of ProposalResponse (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class ProposalActionItem.

action_id.description: AtomicAction identifier if this step invokes an action. Mutually exclusive with flow_id.

flow_id.description: Flow identifier if this step invokes a Flow. Mutually exclusive with action_id.

parameters.description: Keyword arguments forwarded to the action or flow executor.

order.description: Execution order index (0-based). Steps are sorted ascending by order before execution.
